# Comic Strip Canvas

## About
Comic Strip Canvas is a UK-based pop culture wall art brand creating bold, vibrant comic-book style canvas prints, framed prints, and posters. All products are made to order using premium materials (260gsm photo paper for posters, 410gsm water-resistant canvas for canvas prints).

## Products
We offer three distinct art styles:
- Comic Book Covers: Dramatic, vintage-inspired comic book cover designs featuring Film, Music, and Sporting legends
- Comic Book Icons: Bold pop-art graphic portraits with powerful quotes and vivid colour
- Comic Book Strips: Multi-panel sequential storytelling artworks capturing iconic moments

All styles available as:
- Poster Prints (260gsm): Small £9.99, Medium £12.99, Large £16.99
- Canvas Standard Frame (410gsm, 18mm): Small £26.99, Medium £31.99, Large £44.99
- Canvas Gallery Frame (410gsm, 38mm): Small £28.99, Medium £33.99, Large £46.99

Sizes: Small 12x8", Medium 16x12", Large 24x16"
All prices include free UK mainland P&P.

## Personalised Service
Customers can upload their own photos to create personalised comic art in any of our three styles. Artwork fee: £10 for Comic Book Covers and Icons, £25 for Comic Strips. Digital proof provided within 24-48 hours before printing.

## Key Information
- Website: https://comicstripcanvas.co.uk
- Location: United Kingdom
- Delivery: 3-6 working days (UK mainland, free P&P)
- Made to order
- All artwork created in-house
- Proof approval process for personalised orders
